title: carex egena
intro: Carex egena, also known as dwarf sedge or small-flowered sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, Carex egena has been used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Carex egena can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture or salve in herbal preparations, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
